title: Everyone Says I Look Just Like Her
original_title: Everyone Says I Look Just Like Her
overview: Two sisters, one white and one black, spend a week together at their famous father's summer home. A microscopic examination of the new American family unit, it's a deeply personal film about the human connections that bond us all together.
